{{CargoRelic
|name=Moon Bunny
|class_id=20012
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=With a full-power shot, the shrine's laser hit the moon, from which a fragment fell into the pond. A lifeless rabbit was found in the pond. The snail made it into a specimen to celebrate the shrine's incredible power.
|fame=13
|art=27
|fth=19
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Incense used, Snail HP +10<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss2=Per Incense used, Snail HP +20<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss3=Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss4=Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss7=Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
